positive: A whimsical celestial forest scene featuring stylized bioluminescent flora and fauna. The central focus is a harmonious composition of glowing, oversized mushrooms and meandering river spirits, rendered in a clean, linework style with striking negative space. Deep indigo and teal color palette with vibrant accents of electric cyan and neon yellow. Strong high-contrast, graphic illustration suitable for screen printing on apparel. Geometric symmetry, detailed etching quality, central composition, symmetrical silhouette, trending on ArtStation.
